messages.content: 翻译“本文将着重关注外泌体途径对致命疾病特别是肿瘤以及脑部疾病的治疗” 成英文
This article will focus specifically on the therapeutic role of the exosome pathway in life-threatening diseases, especially cancer and brain disorders.
翻译“外泌体所拥有的诸多天然的优良特性加持其成为优异的递送载体” 成英文
The numerous natural advantages possessed by exosomes make them excellent delivery vehicles.
对上述翻译进行润色
The inherent exceptional characteristics of exosomes empower them to be outstanding delivery carriers.
翻译“利用材料科学工具，人们可以对外泌体进行针对性改造，使其能更好的完成对疾病的高效治疗” 成英文
By utilizing materials science tools, researchers can selectively engineer exosomes to enhance their ability to efficiently treat diseases.
对上述翻译进行优化
Through the utilization of materials science tools, exosomes can be precisely modified to optimize their efficacy in high-performance disease therapy.
翻译“利用材料科学工具，人们对外泌体进行定制化改造，使其能匹配某些疾病属性，从而完成疾病的高效治疗”成英文
Using materials science tools, researchers can customize exosomes to tailor their properties to specific diseases, enabling highly efficient therapeutic interventions.
对上述翻译进行润色

By harnessing materials science tools, scientists have the capability to tailor exosomes through customized modifications, allowing them to align with specific disease characteristics and achieve highly effective treatments.

润色“Exosome research has evolved rapidly over the past decade from basic biological research to a discipline of great clinical importance. The inherent exceptional properties of exosomes empower them to be outstanding delivery carriers, especially engineered exosome platforms. By harnessing materials science tools, researchers cleverly tailor exosomes through customized modifications, allowing them to align with specific disease characteristics and achieve highly effective therapeutic interventions. Meanwhile, advanced the clinical translation, and some of the results have shown positive efficacy in clinical trials. In addition, based on the of importance role of exosomes in the development of diseases, starting with the exosome's course of action includes, but is not limited to, inhibiting the secretion of exosomes from specific cells, blocking the uptake of specific exosomes by receptor cells, and realizing the specific removal of the relevant exosomes in the body is also a new approach for the treatment of diseases. This article will focus specifically on the therapeutic role of the exosome in life-threatening diseases, especially cancer and disorders.”

Exosome research has rapidly evolved over the past decade, transitioning from basic biological investigations to becoming a discipline of significant clinical importance. The exceptional properties inherent to exosomes have positioned them as exceptional delivery carriers, particularly when engineered for specific applications. Through the utilization of materials science tools, researchers can ingeniously customize exosomes via tailored modifications, aligning them with specific disease characteristics to achieve highly effective therapeutic interventions. Encouragingly, some clinical trials have already demonstrated positive efficacy, further advancing their clinical translation. Additionally, recognizing the crucial role of exosomes in disease development, novel approaches such as inhibiting their secretion, blocking receptor-mediated uptake, or targeted removal of relevant exosomes have emerged as potential therapeutic strategies. This article will specifically focus on the therapeutic role of exosomes in life-threatening diseases, notably cancer and disorders.
翻译上述文字

Over the past decade, exosome research has swiftly evolved from basic biological investigations to a field of immense clinical significance. With their extraordinary inherent properties, exosomes have emerged as exceptional delivery carriers, particularly when engineered for specific applications. By leveraging materials science tools, researchers can ingeniously customize exosomes through tailored modifications, aligning them with specific disease characteristics to achieve highly effective therapeutic interventions. Encouragingly, certain clinical trials have already demonstrated positive efficacy, further propelling their clinical translation. Additionally, recognizing the pivotal role of exosomes in disease progression, novel approaches such as inhibiting exosome secretion, blocking receptor-mediated uptake, and targeted exosome removal have emerged as potential therapeutic strategies. This article will predominantly focus on unraveling the therapeutic potential of exosomes in life-threatening diseases, particularly cancer and disorders.
翻译“从疾病特征出发，利用材料学手段工程化设计外泌体，为药物递送和免疫疗法建立新一代纳米平台，推进外泌体的临床转化” 成英文

Starting from the characteristics of diseases, utilizing materials science tools to engineer exosomes, a new generation of nano-platforms is established for drug delivery and immunotherapy, promoting the clinical translation of exosomes.
润色上述翻译

Driven by the understanding of disease characteristics, exosomes are being strategically engineered using materials science approaches to create a next-generation nanoplatform for drug delivery and immunotherapy. This advancement is propelling the clinical translation of exosomes in medical applications.
